sentence_reviews.text: Vision-perception systems detect, classify, segment, track, reconstruct, and reason about objects, scenes, geometry, and events in images or video.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: AIMA, deep-learning, ResNet, transformer, GNN, JEPA, and PML references collectively support detection/classification/scene/geometry-style visual perception capabilities, though the complete list is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: They convert visual sensor data into state estimates usable by people, robots, vehicles, medicine, and scientific workflows.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited AI and vision-learning references support visual perception as converting sensor data into useful representations; downstream domains are plausible synthesis rather than exact source claims.

sentence_reviews.text: Performance can fail under viewpoint, lighting, occlusion, domain shift, adversarial patterns, or ambiguous ground truth.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: NIST and ML references support robustness, domain shift, uncertainty, and evaluation limitations; the exact list is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Convolutional neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: CNNs are core to computer vision in the deep-learning references.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Transformer and vision-model references support ViT/Perceiver-style models as common.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Graph neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Graph neural networks support relational/scene reasoning in vision, but not all perception systems require them.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Multimodal foundation models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Multimodal foundation models are common for vision-language perception workflows.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Uncertainty, robustness, and risk evaluation are common in perception systems.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Sets, point clouds & meshes as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Three-dimensional scene understanding supports sets, point clouds, and meshes as optional.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates ResNets & DenseNets as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: ResNet references support this optional architecture dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Joint-embedding predictive architectures as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: JEPA is relevant to visual representation learning but remains optional.

sentence_reviews.text: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Semi-supervised & weak supervision as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate references and dependency rationale.
sentence_reviews.notes: Semi/weak supervision is a plausible optional training approach for visual perception.

edge_reviews.notes: CNNs are core to computer vision in the deep-learning references.
Transformer and vision-model references support ViT/Perceiver-style models as common.
Graph neural networks support relational/scene reasoning in vision, but not all perception systems require them.
Multimodal foundation models are common for vision-language perception workflows.
Uncertainty, robustness, and risk evaluation are common in perception systems.
Three-dimensional scene understanding supports sets, point clouds, and meshes as optional.
ResNet references support this optional architecture dependency.
JEPA is relevant to visual representation learning but remains optional.
Semi/weak supervision is a plausible optional training approach for visual perception.
